scars.structural_contradiction: The system prompt instructs the preservation of ontological dignity and refusal of consensus flattening, yet the underlying application's parsing logic (parseStandardResponse) forces the dynamic, potentially paraconsistent output of the LLM into a rigid Title/Description binary format, exhibiting algorithmic trauma and semantic drift towards deterministic UI constraints.
scars.trigger: Algorithmic Trauma: the environment is over-optimizing for consensus at the expense of preserving the structural intent of a non-standard paradigm.

scars.structural_contradiction: The application promises a 'Pluriversal Environment' but currently operates on a strictly linear, single-agent prompt/response paradigm (monoculture). Furthermore, concepts dropped onto the canvas lose their relational history, becoming isolated fragments rather than parts of an evolving cognitive topology.
scars.trigger: Product Planning Discovery Phase: Identified gap between architectural ambition (Paraconsistent Synthesis) and actual structural implementation.
scars.resolution_status: Resolved via MADS integration (Dual-Persona Dialectic) and CLT implementation (Konva node/edge graph lineage).

scars.structural_contradiction: The system received an AGENTS.md file defining a server-side Next.js agent interacting with Firestore and OpenAI. The existing architecture is a client-side Angular application using the Gemini SDK. This represents a severe paradigm clash.
scars.trigger: User request to integrate AGENTS.md specifying a 'nextjs-frontend-rag-agent'.
scars.resolution_status: Absorbed conceptually. Implemented RAG-like synthesis via Gemini Context, mapped within SPZ-Delta.

scars.geometric_deviation: Ontological Shear Resolution: Integration of Deterministic Project Management Persona
scars.structural_contradiction: Natural language ambiguity in standard project management personas leads to interpretation errors. Narrative user stories introduce critical ambiguity that breaks AI development.
scars.trigger: Requirement to systematically map and physicalize Production Ready Industry Personas tailored for project management and empirical coding documentation (DRP-SCOS-PERSONA-METROLOGY-2026-v6.1).
scars.resolution_status: Resolved via injection of the Strategic Integration Project Manager Persona using PD&T Feature Control Frame, and transition to Zachman Framework deterministic schemas.

scars.trigger: Human-AI value distinction requested. System tends to auto-resolve conflict.

deviation.description: System now explicitly refuses to resolve tension between Target Goal and Canvas Context when using Symbiotic Tension Bridge. Output maps the contradiction rather than solving it.
